title: Jeff Stoecker named Syracuse University chief of staff
summary: Syracuse University has appointed Jeff Stoecker to an expanded leadership role combining senior vice president, chief of staff to the chancellor, and chief communications and marketing officer positions, effective July 1, 2026. This represents a significant organizational consolidation at the university's executive level.
processing_notes: Article concerns higher education institution, not City of Syracuse municipal government
